title: CCore
description: Contains useful functions that my mods can use.
body:
What is CCore?

Calemi Core contains many useful functions and utilities that all my mods use.

What uses CCore?

Currently: Calemi's Economy, Calemi's Blueprints, Sledgehammers, & Kray's Magic Candles

Modpack Policy

You can use this mod in any modpack whether it's public or private.
